completed_tasks.name: Expand phase 01.1 planning for Spring AI-first alignment
Re-verify phase 01.1 on current main branch

remaining_tasks.name: Rename implementation-branded ingestion components to domain-oriented names
Promote Spring AI readers to the primary ingestion path and constrain Tika fallback
Move chunking toward token splitting while preserving metadata and audit fields

decisions.decision: Spring AI ETL/readers should be the default ingestion pipeline going forward
decisions.rationale: User wants repo code to remain the policy/control layer while Spring AI becomes the primary ETL base

decisions.decision: Avoid implementation-branded `SpringAi...` class names in ingestion code
decisions.rationale: User wants domain-oriented naming based on responsibility rather than library choice

decisions.decision: Add a new sub-phase plan 01.1-04 to finish the alignment work inside phase 01.1
decisions.rationale: Current 01.1 implementation is only a partial step toward the desired architecture

next_action: Start implementation of 01.1-04 with the lowest-risk pass: rename SpringAi-branded parser classes and TextChunker, then extract parser selection into a resolver before changing chunking internals.
context_notes: Implementation has not started yet. Exploration and plan-mode work are complete. Context was getting tight, so work paused at the safest checkpoint before code edits. Context7 research confirmed Spring AI ETL APIs needed for token splitting and readers.
